verdicts.reasoning: The homepage confirms that the service is for transcribing and summarizing audio and video content.
The documentation states that requests must include an Authorization header with the API key, confirming the recorded value.
The pricing page shows a Free tier and indicates that users can sign up to receive an API key, confirming the self-serve free access.
The documentation provides a REST base URL and lists various endpoints, confirming the recorded value.
The availability of public REST docs, self-serve signup, and a free API key confirms that the API is buildable today.
